original_file: UKKA_Clinical Guildlines Vascular Access for Hemodialysis.md
title: UK Kidney Association Clinical Practice Guideline Vascular Access for Haemodialysis
summary: This document is a UK Kidney Association clinical practice guideline focused on vascular access for patients undergoing haemodialysis. It provides recommendations for managing vascular access, covering aspects from preparation and assessment to care and management of problems. The guideline aims to update previous recommendations based on recent research and experience, while also expanding coverage to address relevant aspects of haemodialysis vascular access practice.
